MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,356.98 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO ADVERTISER INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA FLEET WORKS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CONT'D:TO INFORM PLTFF'S REP TO GIVE TIME FOR DEF. TO SETTLE AS WE'LL MAIL OTHER JDGMNT COPY W/DEBTOR S STATEMENT OF ASSETS TODAY.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-31-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF AUG-03-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO ADVERTISER INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA FLEET WORKS INC. $1,356.98 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,385.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
